title: thesium alpinum subsp. tenuifolium
intro: Thesium alpinum subsp. tenuifolium, also known as Alpine Thyme or Alpine Wintergreen, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Thymelaeaceae family, characterized by its narrow leaves and pinkish-white flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thesium alpinum subsp. tenuifolium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support the immune system and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
